TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[623.960-669.430] interviewee: first I belonged was on the German time yet. I belonged to the Blau-Weiss. It was a German Jewish youth organization. And all we did-- they taught the songs and a little history. On Sunday, we took trips or hikes. And already during the trips and hikes, I was always concerned about my next ones. When we went on a bicycle ride, I saw a girl or a boy stood behind could make it so fast,

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
And
